assumptions: Design system exists with necessary tokens/components
Login page component exists and can be modified
Figma design reference contains the visual specifications
review_questions: Does the design system have all necessary tokens/components for buttons, inputs, typography, colors, spacing?
Are there existing login page implementations to reference for patterns?
Is the Figma design reference accessible and does it provide sufficient visual detail?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 5 (single page, 1-2 files), Risk: 6 (UI change, no security impact), Novelty: 5 (following existing design patterns), Cross: 2 (frontend only), Ambiguity: 2 (clear acceptance criteria), Deps: 0 (self-contained). Total: 20

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains ## Acceptance Criteria with 7 detailed checkable items covering UI elements, design system tokens, responsive behavior. Promoted spec.md to allow skipping spec stage.
